description:
A business merger has occurred. 'Summit Drone Services' has acquired 'Valley UAV Logistics'. Consolidate these entities in the Aerobridge registry by transferring all assets (Aircraft) and personnel (Pilots/Staff) from 'Valley UAV Logistics' to 'Summit Drone Services'. Once all assets and personnel have been moved, delete the 'Valley UAV Logistics' company record to dissolve the entity. Ensure all aircraft and personnel are preserved and moved to the new owner rather than deleted.

Login credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: adminpass123
